summary:
# 每日彙整報告

## 📰 今日重點摘要
1. 特朗普總統支持CFTC主席Selig擴大預測市場權限的推動，顯示出政策支持的潛在影響。
2. 比特幣礦業股票因AI基礎設施需求上漲，顯示出跨領域融合的潛力。
3. 西班牙因潛在賭博法違規封鎖預測市場Kalshi和Polymarket，顯示出監管環境的日益嚴格。
4. TeraWulf收購肯塔基AI數據中心，以滿足日益增長的電力需求。
5. DeFi總鎖倉價值因KelpDAO漏洞下滑14%，顯示出市場風險偏好回落。

## 📊 市場概況
今日市場整體氛圍偏向疲弱，主流幣價格普遍下跌。比特幣（BTC）報價為$75,723，24小時內下滑約1.75%；以太坊（ETH）則報價$2,067.72，跌幅略超過1.74%。Solana（SOL）和BNB也同樣受到波及，分別下跌1.40%和0.70%。整體市場情緒仍顯示出謹慎，投資者對未來走勢持觀望態度。

## 🔍 技術分析解讀
根據目前的技術指標，比特幣的RSI為40.5，顯示出略微超賣的狀態，而以太坊的RSI僅為31.6，顯示出更強的超賣壓力。所有主流幣的均線訊號均為空頭，這意味著短期內下行風險仍然存在。若RSI未能回升，可能會持續拖累價格走勢。

## 😱 市場情緒
當前的恐懼貪婪指數為34，屬於恐懼區域，顯示出投資者情緒相對悲觀。社群對市場未來發展的信心不足，特別是在近期的監管消息和市場波動影響下，許多投資者選擇保持觀望，等待更明確的趨勢出現。

## ⚠️ 風險提醒
隨著市場風險偏好的回落及監管環境的變化，投資者需謹慎對待短期內可能出現的價格波動。此外，DeFi領域的漏洞和安全問題仍需特別關注，以避免資金損失。

## 🎯 今日觀察重點
投資者應密切關注特朗普對CFTC的支持可能帶來的政策變化，以及AI基礎設施如何影響比特幣礦業的長期走勢。同時，需留意各國對加密市場的監管動向，尤其是西班牙最新的封鎖措施，這可能會影響市場信心和資金流動。

news.title: Bitcoin Giant Strategy Slashes Cash Reserves by 61% to Repurchase $1.5 Billion in Debt
news.summary: Strategy used 61% of its dedicated cash buffer to repurchase $1.5 billion in convertible notes, leaving its Bitcoin stash untouched.
news.title_zh: 比特幣巨頭Strategy將現金儲備削減61%，以回購15億美元債務
news.summary_zh: 比特幣巨頭Strategy大幅削減現金儲備，計劃回購15億美元的債務，以改善財務狀況。

news.title: Bitcoin’s big cup-and-handle pattern targets ‘minimum’ $220K BTC price
news.summary: Bitcoin cup-and-handle chart breakout targets $220,000, but BTC price must first hold the $74,000 support area.
news.title_zh: 比特幣的大杯柄形態目標為「最低」22萬美元BTC價格
news.summary_zh: 分析師指出，比特幣的杯柄形態預示著其價格可能達到至少22萬美元，吸引投資者關注。

news.title: Crypto Industry Fights Senator Warren's Claim That Coinbase, Ripple Bank Charter Approvals Are Illegal
news.summary: The Digital Chamber urged the OCC on Tuesday to defend its recent national bank charter approvals for crypto firms, which Sen. Elizabeth Warren slammed as improper.
news.title_zh: 加密行業反擊沃倫參議員聲稱Coinbase和Ripple銀行特許批准違法
news.summary_zh: 加密行業對沃倫參議員的指控進行反擊，強調Coinbase和Ripple的銀行特許批准是合法的。

news.title: Ethereum treasury firms lean on staking as ETF pressure builds: Report
news.summary: Everstake said staking made up 60% of disclosed revenue among six Ethereum treasury firms, while loss-making companies posted $1.41 billion in losses.
news.title_zh: 以太坊財庫公司在ETF壓力增大下依賴質押：報導
news.summary_zh: 報導指出，隨著ETF壓力的增加，以太坊財庫公司開始更加依賴質押來維持其資金流動性。

news.title: Bitmine capitalizes on Ethereum price drop, buys over 100,000 ETH as 5% supply goal nears
news.summary: "We view the recent pullback of ETH to below $2,200 as an attractive opportunity," Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee said.
news.title_zh: Bitmine 利用以太坊價格下跌，購買超過 100,000 ETH，接近 5% 的供應目標
news.summary_zh: Bitmine 在以太坊價格下跌時大舉購買 ETH，目標是達到總供應的 5%。

news.title: Bitmine made its largest ETH purchase this year despite Tom Lee's slowdown suggestion
news.title_zh: Bitmine 在 Tom Lee 建議放緩的情況下進行今年最大 ETH 購買
news.summary_zh: 儘管市場專家 Tom Lee 提出放緩的建議，Bitmine 仍然進行了大規模的 ETH 購買。

news.title: Hong Kong advances virtual asset advisory and management rulemaking
news.summary: Hong Kong moves to license crypto advisers and managers under anti-money laundering rules, with a 2026 legislative target.
news.title_zh: 香港推進虛擬資產諮詢和管理的法規制定
news.summary_zh: 香港政府正在制定針對虛擬資產的諮詢和管理規則，以促進市場發展。

news.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: SUI drops 1.1%, leading index lower
news.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 表現更新：SUI 下跌 1.1%，導致指數下滑
news.summary_zh: CoinDesk 20 指數因 SUI 的小幅下跌而出現整體下滑。

news.title: Lucky Trader Rides $341 World Cup Meme Coin Buy to 14,000% Gains
news.summary: The trader still has over $100,000 worth of unrealized gains in the World Cup token, ahead of the start of the tournament next month.
news.title_zh: 幸運交易者以 341 美元購買世界杯迷因幣，獲得 14,000% 的收益
news.summary_zh: 一位幸運的交易者因購買世界杯迷因幣而獲得驚人的 14,000% 回報。

news.title: Liquid launches Co-Invest app, bringing AI-powered live trade execution into ChatGPT and Claude
news.summary: Co-Invest supports crypto, equities, FX, Polymarket positions and pre-IPO secondaries across over 500 markets, according to Liquid.
news.title_zh: Liquid 推出 Co-Invest 應用程式，將 AI 驅動的實時交易執行引入 ChatGPT 和 Claude
news.summary_zh: Liquid 的新應用程式 Co-Invest 將人工智慧技術整合進行實時交易執行。

news.title: Strive acquires 1,109 bitcoin, raising total holdings to 16,500 coins
news.title_zh: Strive 購買 1,109 顆比特幣，將總持有量提高至 16,500 顆
news.summary_zh: Strive 進一步擴大其比特幣持有量，現在總共擁有 16,500 顆。

news.title: Morning Minute: Trump Hints That Iran Deal May Be Close, Markets Rebound
news.summary: Markets bounced back on Trump's “largely negotiated” U.S.-Iran deal, but further airstrikes underscore the fragile geopolitical position.
news.title_zh: 早晨快訊：特朗普暗示伊朗協議可能接近，市場回升
news.summary_zh: 特朗普的言論促使市場回升，暗示伊朗協議有望達成。

news.title: Bitcoin treasury firms add 603 BTC as Strategy pauses buying
news.summary: Smaller Bitcoin treasury companies bought about $46 million worth of Bitcoin below $80,000 last week as the largest corporate holder paused
news.title_zh: 比特幣財庫公司新增 603 BTC，策略暫停購買
news.summary_zh: 比特幣財庫公司在策略暫停購買的情況下，仍然增加了 603 顆 BTC。

news.title: Strategy taps cash reserve to retire $1.5 billion in convertible debt
news.title_zh: 策略利用現金儲備償還 15 億美元的可轉換債務
news.summary_zh: 策略公司決定使用現金儲備來清償其可轉換債務，總額達 15 億美元。

news.title: Binance eyes Philippines return through SEC sandbox partnership
news.summary: Binance remains blocked in the Philippines after a 2024 NTC directive tied to SEC concerns over licensing and registration.
news.title_zh: 幣安透過與SEC沙盒合作尋求重返菲律賓
news.summary_zh: 幣安計劃透過與菲律賓證券交易委員會的合作，重返當地市場，尋求合規發展機會。

news.title: Spain joins growing list of countries shutting out Polymarket and Kalshi
news.title_zh: 西班牙加入越來越多禁止Polymarket和Kalshi的國家行列
news.summary_zh: 西班牙政府決定禁止Polymarket和Kalshi，成為越來越多採取類似措施的國家之一。

news.title: Bitcoin demand gauge sinks to worst level since December as spot buying weakens
news.title_zh: 比特幣需求指標降至自去年12月以來的最低水平，現貨購買疲弱
news.summary_zh: 比特幣的需求指標顯示出疲弱跡象，現貨市場的購買活動顯著下降。

news.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum ETFs Shed $112M as Hyperliquid Funds Extend 8-Day Win Streak
news.summary: Hyperliquid ETFs posted an 8-day inflow streak as the network’s native token HYPE hit a new all-time high Sunday.
news.title_zh: 比特幣和以太坊ETF損失1.12億美元，Hyperliquid基金延續8天獲利
news.summary_zh: 在市場波動中，比特幣和以太坊ETF遭遇資金流出，而Hyperliquid基金則持續獲利。

news.title: ‘Optimism looks fragile’: Bitcoin wavers as Iran strikes revive geopolitical tensions and analysts warn of range trap
news.summary: Analysts warn of a range trap as underwater bitcoin buyers build resistance near $79,000 and tensions flare again in the Middle East.
news.title_zh: ‘樂觀情緒看似脆弱’：隨著伊朗打擊重燃地緣政治緊張，比特幣波動
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格因地緣政治緊張而波動，分析師警告可能面臨範圍陷阱。

news.title: StablR freezes USDR and EURR after attacker mints $13.5 million in unbacked tokens
news.title_zh: StablR凍結USDR和EURR，因攻擊者鑄造1350萬美元無擔保代幣
news.summary_zh: 因遭受攻擊，StablR決定凍結其USDR和EURR穩定幣，以防止進一步損失。

news.title: Bitcoin ETFs crushed by billions in outflows as Treasuries stifle interest-rate cut hopes

news.summary_zh: 比特幣ETF面臨巨額資金流出，市場對降息的期待受到國債影響。

news.title: Ex-Hodlnaut CEO charged with fraud over Terra exposure claims
news.summary: Singapore police charge ex-Hodlnaut CEO Zhu Juntao with six counts of fraud by false representation over allegedly misleading statement
news.title_zh: 前Hodlnaut首席執行官因Terra暴露指控被控詐騙
news.summary_zh: 前Hodlnaut首席執行官因涉及Terra的虛假陳述而面臨詐騙指控。

news.title: Crypto funds bleed $1.47B as risk-off sentiment deepens
news.summary: Crypto ETPs logged $1.47 billion of outflows last week as Bitcoin funds led losses, while nine altcoin ETPs still attracted inflows of mo
news.title_zh: 加密基金損失14.7億美元，風險厭惡情緒加深
news.summary_zh: 隨著市場風險厭惡情緒加深，加密基金遭遇重大資金流出，損失達14.7億美元。

news.title: Bitcoin risks another lower high as stocks rally, AI tokens outperform
news.title_zh: 比特幣面臨再次創低點的風險，股票反彈，AI代幣表現優異
news.summary_zh: 在股票市場反彈的背景下，比特幣可能面臨再次創低點的風險，而AI代幣則表現突出。

news.title: Ethereum price chart targets $1.8K as total value locked hits 13-month lows
news.summary: Ether price eyes a 14% drop to $1,800 as it trades in a classic bearish pattern amid declining total value locked on the Ethereum network.
news.title_zh: 以太坊價格圖標的目標為1,800美元，總鎖倉價值降至13個月低點
news.summary_zh: 以太坊的價格面臨挑戰，因為其總鎖倉價值降至近13個月以來的最低點。

news.title: Luffa secures strategic investment from GoFintech Quantum at US$220 million valuation, pioneering AI + fintech frontier
news.summary: Luffa AI, a leading innovator at the intersection of Web3 and Artificial Intelligence, today announced a strategic equity investm
news.title_zh: Luffa獲得GoFintech Quantum的戰略投資，估值達2.2億美元，開創AI與金融科技的前沿
news.summary_zh: Luffa成功吸引GoFintech Quantum的投資，進一步推動AI與金融科技的結合。

news.title: Hyperliquid launches prediction markets for real-world events
news.summary: Hyperliquid launched canonical prediction markets for offchain events, expanding beyond perps as analysts frame it as an onchain superapp.
news.title_zh: Hyperliquid推出現實事件的預測市場
news.summary_zh: Hyperliquid新推出的預測市場將專注於現實世界事件的預測，擴大其市場範圍。

news.title: Robinhood clears final regulatory approval for $180M WonderFi deal ahead of expected June 1 close
news.summary: Canada's CIRO approved Robinhood's acquisition of WonderFi, clearing the final regulatory hurdle ahead of an expected June 1 close.
news.title_zh: Robinhood獲得1.8億美元WonderFi交易的最終監管批准，預計於6月1日完成
news.summary_zh: Robinhood成功獲得監管批准，將於6月1日完成與WonderFi的交易。

news.title: Bitget launches RWA platform Reality in tokenization push
news.summary: Bitget said Reality will initially offer tokenized exposure to selected U.S. stocks and ETFs through its broader trading ecosystem.
news.title_zh: Bitget推出RWA平台Reality，推動代幣化進程
news.summary_zh: Bitget的新平台Reality旨在促進現實資產的代幣化，擴大其業務範疇。

news.title: Bitwise debuts Canton Network ETP on Deutsche Börse Xetra
news.summary: Bitwise listed a Canton Network ETP on Deutsche Börse Xetra, backing it with CC tokens held in cold storage.
news.title_zh: Bitwise在德意志交易所Xetra推出Canton Network ETP
news.summary_zh: Bitwise在德意志交易所成功推出Canton Network ETP，為投資者提供新選擇。

news.title: Bitcoin caught between critical onchain support and an options showdown
news.title_zh: 比特幣在關鍵鏈上支撐與期權對決之間掙扎
news.summary_zh: 比特幣目前面臨重大挑戰，需在鏈上支撐和期權市場之間找到平衡。

news.title: XRP Ledger to delete NFT junk and patch key bugs in a new upgrade
news.title_zh: XRP Ledger將刪除NFT垃圾並修補關鍵漏洞，進行新升級
news.summary_zh: XRP Ledger計劃進行升級，刪除無用的NFT並修補系統漏洞。

news.title: AI agents must be treated as untrusted systems: Researchers
news.summary: AI agents are becoming increasingly popular among crypto users, with Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire predicting that billions of AI agents will be operatin
news.title_zh: 研究人員：AI代理必須被視為不可信系統
news.summary_zh: 研究指出，AI代理應被視為不可信的系統，以確保安全性和可靠性。

news.title: Strive adds 1,109 Bitcoin as digital credit products gain traction
news.summary: The company increased its holdings to 16,500 BTC as Bitcoin-linked preferred securities such as SATA and Strategy’s STRC gain traction in emerging “digital credit” markets.</
news.title_zh: Strive新增1,109比特幣，數字信用產品獲得關注
news.summary_zh: Strive在數字信用產品的推廣中新增1,109比特幣，顯示市場需求上升。

news.title: Liquid launches ChatGPT and Claude trading app with live market execution
news.summary: Co-Invest lets users fund accounts, analyze positions and execute trades across more than 500 markets without leaving AI chat interfaces.
news.title_zh: Liquid推出具即時市場執行的ChatGPT和Claude交易應用程式
news.summary_zh: Liquid推出新交易應用程式，結合ChatGPT和Claude，提供即時市場執行功能。

news.title: Hyperliquid takes a swing at Polymarket with macro outcome bets
news.title_zh: Hyperliquid對Polymarket發起攻擊，推出宏觀結果投注
news.summary_zh: Hyperliquid推出新功能，專注於宏觀結果的投注，挑戰Polymarket的市場地位。

news.title: Scammers make $400K through fake Uniswap ads on Google
news.summary: A blockchain analyst has warned that malicious phishing advertisements impersonating Uniswap have appeared on Goog
news.title_zh: 詐騙者透過Google上的假Uniswap廣告賺取40萬美元
news.summary_zh: 詐騙者利用虛假的Uniswap廣告在Google上獲利，金額高達40萬美元。

news.title: At $322 billion, the stablecoin market value exceeds the FX reserves of 95 nations
news.title_zh: 穩定幣市場價值達3220億美元，超過95國外匯儲備
news.summary_zh: 穩定幣市場的總價值已超過3220億美元，超過了95個國家的外匯儲備。

news.title: Ondo Finance founder Nathan Allman dies unexpectedly
news.title_zh: Ondo Finance創辦人Nathan Allman意外去世
news.summary_zh: Ondo Finance的創辦人Nathan Allman不幸去世，震驚業界。

news.title: Bitmine’s Tom Lee hints at stock tailwinds after firm considered for Russell 3000
news.summary: Bitmine's Tom Lee says the firm could be considered for the Russell 1000, and its stock may get a boost from active and passive fund managers.
news.title_zh: Bitmine的Tom Lee暗示公司考慮進入Russell 3000後股市有利好
news.summary_zh: Tom Lee表示，Bitmine考慮進入Russell 3000指數，可能為股市帶來正面影響。

news.title: Bitcoin in ‘high-risk zone’ as ETF outflows signal institutional exit: Swissblock
news.summary: This steady drip of ETF outflow continues to add to the supply side without a visible demand offset, said G
news.title_zh: 比特幣進入「高風險區」，ETF資金外流顯示機構退出：Swissblock
news.summary_zh: Swissblock報告指出，比特幣面臨高風險，ETF資金外流顯示機構投資者可能退出市場。

news.title: XRP slips below $1.35 after triangle breakdown puts focus on $1.30 support
news.title_zh: XRP跌破1.35美元，三角形破位後關注1.30美元支撐
news.summary_zh: XRP價格跌破1.35美元，市場關注其能否守住1.30美元的支撐位。

news.title: HYPE briefly overtakes Dogecoin, privacy tokens slide as US strikes on Iran rattle markets

news.summary_zh: HYPE在市場上短暫超越狗狗幣，但隱私代幣因地緣政治緊張而下跌。

news.title: Ondo Finance founder Nathan Allman dies aged 32
news.summary: Ondo Finance says its founder, Nathan Allman, died unexpectedly, with company president Ian De Bode to serve as CEO.
news.title_zh: Ondo Finance創辦人Nathan Allman享年32歲去世
news.summary_zh: 年僅32歲的Ondo Finance創辦人Nathan Allman去世，業界感到惋惜。

news.title: Kelp DAO says rsETH restored 5 weeks after $293M protocol hack
news.summary: Kelp DAO says that sETH mints, redemptions and rewards operations have been running smoothly
news.title_zh: 海藻 DAO 表示 rsETH 在 293 億美元協議黑客事件後 5 週恢復
news.summary_zh: 海藻 DAO 宣布在遭受黑客攻擊後，rsETH 已於五週內恢復，重建信任。

news.title: Bitcoin volatility falls to 8-month low: Is a BTC breakout imminent?
news.summary: Bitcoin’s 8-month low volatility can’t predict BTC’s price prediction but derivatives data does suggest that a rally to $82,000 would cause a large shor
news.title_zh: 比特幣波動性降至 8 個月低點：比特幣突破即將來臨？
news.summary_zh: 比特幣的波動性降至八個月以來的最低點，市場分析師預測可能出現突破。

news.title: Bitcoin holds $77K as stocks rally, global tensions cool: Are BTC bulls back?
news.summary: Data suggests that Bitcoin may be gearing up for a rally to $82,000. Will bulls seize the opportunity?
news.title_zh: 比特幣保持在 77,000 美元，股市反彈，全球緊張局勢緩和：比特幣牛市回歸？
news.summary_zh: 隨著股市上漲和全球緊張局勢緩解，比特幣穩定在 77,000 美元，市場情緒回暖。
